compiled_state.author: Iso Tester
compiled_state.description:
Tighten the verifier IMPACT prompt for consistency (robustness, not a blocker). The severity
attributes get zero anchoring in `plan_review_verifier.md` (vs the rich validity guidance), so
add per-attribute definitions, level anchors, and plan-aware framing to curb per-ticket
inflation. Guarded by the `discriminates_impact_levels` eval already landed + the distribution
report. (Body/title were previously swapped with task ec89 — this restores the impact-prompt
scope to its matching title and removes the accidental duplication of the docs+tests task 4cb9.)

This task is independent of the novelty/rising-floor chain (no hard dep); it hardens the impact
axis the Pass-3 floor relies on so the verifier cannot regress to rating every finding the same
(the severity-saturation the floor would be blind to).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Each severity attribute (prod_impact, debt_impact, blast_radius, likelihood, reversibility) has a definition + level anchors in `src/rebar/llm/reviewers/plan_review_verifier.md` (+ `_agentic`)
- [ ] Plan-stage framing for reversibility/blast_radius (a plan is pre-merge — anchor severity to the planned change, not a shipped system)
- [ ] `discriminates_impact_levels` eval still passes (≥ its existing bar on the high/low pairs); `scripts/plan_review_impact_distribution.py` shows no regression to saturation

file_impact.reason: Add severity-attribute definitions + level anchors + plan-stage framing
Mirror impact-prompt anchoring in the agentic variant

compiled_state.title: Tighten the verifier impact prompt (robustness)
